title: Things and Utilities
description:
Mod that adds a couple of things like paintings, famous music records without copyright and obsidian weapons

We hope you have fun
body:
## A mod created by Especialista104 and André`s Game

### Compatibility ✅
Fistly: our mod is compatible with every optimization mods!
Secondly: This mod, for No Bug reason we don`t have JEI compatibility

### Comunity and Issues Reports 🪲
If you wanna talk to someone our you know a bug from a update you can **always** go to our Discord server.

### Resume of what adds 📄
Mod that adds a couple of things like paintings, famous music records without copyright and obsidian weapons

### Copyrights ©️ 
Our mod have All Rights Reserved (ARR)®️™

### Donate $
We have a Minecraft community but for a better player and automation expirience you can support us buying credits to Exaroton instead of Aternos! Link:[https://exaroton.com/pools/bJ1bPs1G55ux8MfN](https://exaroton.com/pools/bJ1bPs1G55ux8MfN)
